name: Apricot Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well.
2. Boil the mixture for about 10 minutes, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
3. Allow it to cool completely.
4. Spread on a large platter and chill overnight or for several hours.
5. Shape into balls and roll in granulated sugar.
This will make about 6 dozen Apricot Balls.
